jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates:
Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Life Insurance Asia Pacific Associates!
